results.title: HKSAR V. LO KIN MAN (盧建民)
results.coram: Before: Chief Justice Cheung, Mr Justice Ribeiro PJ, Mr Justice Fok PJ, Mr Justice Lam PJ and Lord Sumption NPJ
results.parties: BETWEEN HKSAR Respondent (Respondent) and LEUNG TIN KEI (梁天琦) (D1) 1 st Applicant LO KIN MAN (盧建民) (D3) 2 nd Applicant (Appellant) WONG KA KUI (黃家駒) (D5) 3 rd Applicant
